# Unable to Add Attachments While Process is Running for Unrelated Task

While an unrelated task was running, I was unable to attach a screenshot (button was disabled) to an entirely different task that was not actively running. I should be able to edit tasks, including adding attachments, if those tasks are not actively running.

  "summary": "When a process/task is running, the attachment button (e.g., for adding screenshots) is disabled globally for all tasks, including those that are completely unrelated and not actively running.
